title: Newcastle Heavy Rain
lead: Newcastle upon Tyne is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.74. This event is extremely rare and has a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The heavy rain in Newcastle upon Tyne is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The city is expected to receive more rainfall in the coming hours, with humidity levels at 87% and wind speeds of 8.3 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 14.1 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no cooling demand.
